programme.desc: In her grief, Guo Ying kills Antonio in a car accident. At her wit's end, she calls Yao Kang for help. He disposes of the corpse and teaches Guo Ying how to respond to the police. In a daze, she follows Yao Kang's plan. Ying Jie asks about the car accident after they return home. Yao Kang explains for Guo Ying, but Ying Jie is full of doubts and senses that Guo Ying is hiding something.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 18
programme.desc: Mary knows Zhi Ming doesn't wish to go back to base because of Yu Xuan. She decides to hire an assassin to get rid of Dex and Yu Xuan. Dex and Yu Xuan both receive a text from Aaron to meet at the yacht club. When they reached, they realised it was a trap all along. The assassin hunts them down, and Dex sacrifices himself for Yu Xuan. Before he died, Dex confesses his love to Yu Xuan.

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 2
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 21
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 11
programme.desc: Crossing into Albania, Karthick is greeted by rugged mountains, turquoise beaches, and a culture bursting with warmth and resilience. From savoring slow-cooked meats to stumbling upon age-old bunkers and lively street cafes, Albania quickly proves it's more than just a hidden gem - it’s an unforgettable chapter in his Balkan journey.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 12
programme.desc: Albania hits Karthick with a history lesson and a plot twist - from the once-dreaded-now-hipster Pyramid of Tirana to cooling off with a Red Bull ice cream (yes, that’s a thing). He gets schooled in Albanian hospitality, nearly adopts a stray dog, and ends up at a traditional restaurant started by an actor-director who clearly knows drama and dumplings. Albania’s past may be heavy, but Karthick’s experience is anything but!

programme.title: Tarla

programme.title: 50-50 S2 - EP 2

In this 13-episode series, 12 contestants will battle through two Q&A segments and a physical challenge each week, with the top performer earning immunity and the rest facing elimination based on open votes.

programme.title: Minsaara Kanavu (1997)

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 13
programme.desc: It’s the final episode, and Karthick wraps up his Balkan journey with a scenic visit to Lake Bovilla and a crash course in Albanian pride, courtesy of national hero Skanderbeg. He feasts on traditional dishes one last time - but with a twist. This time, he does the cooking, whipping up his beloved Jala Prata and serving it to unsuspecting Albanians. Will they love it? Will they politely smile through the spice?

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 289

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 253

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 306

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 287
programme.desc: A natural, drug-free remedy that uses Far Infrared (FIR) technology and acupoint stimulation to relieve cough, throat irritation, and phlegm - improving circulation and easing discomfort from colds, flu, or post-viral irritation. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 305

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 297

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 242

programme.title: We Never Stop - EP 10
programme.desc: The program brings together 100 Chinese physical fitness experts to compete in an undifferentiated physical fitness competition, and ultimately determines a champion to become the "strongest body" of the year.

programme.title: Life's Perfectionists S16 - EP 28
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) This programme introduces individuals who are outstanding in their respective fields of work. Find out how the featured individuals rose to the top of their leagues based on hard work and enthusiasm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 15
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 9
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Wen Li and Da Wei are seen behaving "intimately" by Jia Ling and Li Ta. Mdm Ruan shows the video recording to Jia Nan. This news eventually reaches Xia Yun and he quarrels with Mdm Ruan.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 35
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhengmin threatens to fire Shixun. Outraged, Shixun warns him to stop, threatening to take Zhi-en back and expose the incriminating evidence he has against him.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 36
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Minghua reveals to Meilan that she is her biological mother, then uses the truth to emotionally manipulate and control her. The revelation leaves Meilan stunned and emotionally shaken.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 8
programme.desc: They return to Changbin with three local guides leading the way, embarking on a leisurely journey through eastern Taiwan’s mountains, sea, and cuisine. Through every bite, they savor the warmth and charm of Taitung’s people and culture. Along the coastal route, they discover Taitung’s signature dishes, explore the flavors of mountain and sea, and learn about sustainable farming and fishing, experiencing nature’s blessings.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 2
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zaiyuan feels sorry for suspecting her father and discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 42
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 21
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 17
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.desc: Desperate to save her marriage after her husband Nada (Masaji Wijayanto) leaves, Melody visits a paranormal. She asks to 'trade in' her husband for a better version and go back to the past. The paranormal grants her wish, casting a spell that throws Melody into a time portal.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 188
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bukan Cuma Khodam, Love Tester Kita Juga Cocok
programme.desc: At the market, Rani (Aylena Fusil) buys coconut milk from Aris (Masaji Wijayanto), but a misunderstanding leads Aris to believe she hasn't paid. He chases her down for the money. Meanwhile, Rani's grandmother consults a psychic to find the perfect man for her granddaughter, leading to a fated encounter.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 642
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Definisi Mencintai Dalam Bacang

programme.title: Jangan Spam Cinta di Hatiku
programme.desc: After a rainy-day argument leads to a breakup with her short-tempered boyfriend, Mika decides to undergo a massive makeover to look her best. In her quest for a 'glow-up,' she meets a handsome cotton candy vendor who calls her out for being 'short-fused' and judgmental.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 642

programme.title: CINTA MEMANG BIKIN GILA

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 137

programme.title: FOTOGRAFER MUNDURAN DONG TAMPANNYA NIKUNG

programme.desc: Tasya (Soraya Rasyid) is a beautiful girl who lives for the thrill of illegal street racing. One day, her gang's reckless stunt nearly injures one of Rendy’s (Bara Valentino) elementary students. programme.desc: Rosi (Rayna Snova) and Vino (Jeff Smith) broke up after Rosi’s mother accepted a bribe from Vino’s family to stay away. Years later, Vino is working as a 'ghost' in a night market haunted house. Unaware of the man behind the mask, Rosi pours her heart out to the 'ghost,' crying about how her ex cheated on her.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: While holidaying in Goa with her family, a shy Muskaan falls for Dino, a dancer at the resort. Problems ensue when her father objects to their relationship as he believes Dino has impregnated a woman. Release Year: 2006 Director: Pooja Bhatt

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Attack: Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Bob Biswas
programme.desc: Bob Biswas, an insurance agent, is released from hospital after eight years in a coma and is welcomed by his wife Mary and son Benny. He has lost his memory and does not remember the past. Release Year: 2021 Director: Diya Annapurna Ghosh

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Gopichand Jasoos
programme.desc: Detective Gopichand Jasoos tracks stolen diamonds to Goa, but rival hunters close in, forcing him into a clever race filled with danger and twists. Release Year: 1982 Director: Naresh Kumar

programme.title: Super Nani
programme.desc: The movie about a woman who is always insulted by her family. While her children, don't care for their mother, her grandson decides to change her. Release Year: 2014 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.title: Hero Hindustani
programme.desc: A man realizes that India is completely alien to his London-raised granddaughter and arranges her marriage there. She gets a guide to pose as her fiance and falls for him. Release Year: 1998 Director: Aziz Sejawal

programme.title: Raid (2023)
programme.desc: An honest income-tax officer raids a corrupt politician's mansion, uncovering hidden wealth and facing intense pressure and danger while standing firm for truth and justice.

programme.title: Dhaakad
programme.desc: Agent Agni, despite her doubts, accepts the mission to capture Rudraveer, a dangerous trafficker. But the pursuit soon leads her into unexpected and perilous paths. Release Year: 2022 Director: Razneesh Ghai

programme.title: The Wife

programme.title: Jurm
programme.desc: A powerful businessman is jailed for his wife's murder, forcing him to unravel betrayal and hidden truths while his perfect world collapses around him. Release Year: 1990 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.title: Ishqedarriyaan
programme.desc: Aagam loves Luvleen deeply, but she loves Arjun. Choosing her happiness over his own, Aagam sacrifices his heart so she can live the life she truly wants. Release Year: 2015 Director: V.K. Prakash

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Junoon
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Ghar Ki Laxmi
programme.desc: The story of a prisoner on Death row fighting his wrongful conviction in the backdrop of Chess.

programme.title: Shakuntala Devi: A Human Computer
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: A cop with an excellent track record is assigned to investigate a challenging case. The more he probes, the case gets complicated further.

programme.desc: A common man with honesty and integrity can take on the system when he has truth on his side.

programme.title: Rafoo Chakkar
programme.desc: A wealthy industrialist is murdered and the blame falls on a person who hails from a poor family. To prove his innocence,he must strive hard to prove and gather evidence that clears him of this crime.

programme.title: Do Anjane
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Kahan Shuru Kahan Khatam
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: Ganapath - A Hero Is Born
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Operation Valentine
programme.desc: A woman boards an overnight train and gets placed in a compartment with her former lover and his wife.

programme.desc: The son of a wealthy, powerful industrialist returns to India and undergoes a remarkable transformation as he becomes consumed by a quest for vengeance against those threatening his father's life.

programme.desc: A bureaucrat is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

programme.desc: Shankar and Mukti's intense love story unfolds against the backdrop of Benaras, exploring surrender and transformation that heals, hurts and changes them.

programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.desc: A woman rejects her arranged marriage, sparking a chaotic chase as she tries to escape the wedding, while the groom and his family try to catch her.

Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres En Perigord Vert
programme.desc: In Perigord, Isabelle Maurin, recently crowned Queen of Araucania, is found decapitated in the garden of the chateau she has just inherited. This is not the first murder linked to this family. Emma Lambert, a young police lieutenant from Bordeaux, conducts the investigation with Sacha Besson, a lieutenant of the local gendarmerie.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Un Petit Frere
programme.desc: Rose leaves the Ivory Coast for France with her two sons, Jean and Ernest. The single mother gets a job as a chambermaid and struggles every day to keep her family afloat. As teenagers and then young adults, Jean and Ernest are confronted by the difficulties of integration.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 11
programme.desc: While Leon is finishing the first draft of his novel, Ricardo continues to miss his classes. His parents have to intervene to get him to straighten himself out. Doris' help may prove useful...

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 12
programme.desc: Francis and Julietta are getting married! Leon discovers the cover for his novel. Things are not getting any better for Ricardo, who manages to alienate his best friend. Florence's health takes a turn for the worse...

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 13
programme.desc: It's the day of the wedding and everyone is there with Francis and Julietta to celebrate their marriage. Love is in the air... Ricardo and Doris are closer than ever. While Florence's state of health continues to decline, an important call interrupts the festivities...

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 64
programme.desc: Not far from Pithiviers, in Nibelle, the Chateau du Hallier was a gift from King Charles IX to Marie Touchet, the love of his life.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 28
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 37
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Tendance XXI

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1812
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Bien Bati - EP 7
programme.desc: Craig pumping station in Montreal was dismantled with a view to being restored. In Gentilly, a 18th-century house has been completely rebuilt. Lastly: traditional carpentry at Lefebvre.

programme.desc: Marie-Claude Lortie meets climate experts to find out the impact of climate change in Quebec along with farmers who are adapting to the new conditions facing farm work.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 8
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 23
programme.desc: Kongoue Bian seems to have become possessed by a spirit and hurls himself at Ebri Morrow intent on grabbing his purse. Pokou passes her final test. The High Priestess recounts the story of Anansi.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 36
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 14
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 14
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Fumer Fait Tousser
programme.desc: Five justice fighters, the ''Tabac Force'', go on a retreat to strengthen their team cohesion. Until a sort of emperor of evil decides to wipe out the planet. Zany sketches, tight latex suits, DIY special effects, actors' performances: a bizarre gore fable but without toxicity!

programme.title: Au-Dela Des Murs
programme.desc: One morning, Lina is getting ready to go to Baumettes prison to attend her first visit. Nadjim, her boyfriend, has recently been imprisoned. Before leaving, she gathers things to take to him.

programme.title: La Confrontation
programme.desc: In a police station, Maxime, 17, is being questioned one last time today. Anxiety rises: she will soon have to face her greatest fear. Finding herself in the same room as the man who hurt her when she was a child, her godfather.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 1
programme.desc: September 1994. French President Francois Mitterrand had to manage a complicated cohabitation with Prime Minister edouard Balladur. The publication of a book by the journalist Pierre Pean, tracing his career under the Vichy government, forced the Head of State to justify himself to the French people.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 2
programme.desc: On 3 November 1994, Francois Mitterrand saw the existence of his second family made official by ''Paris Match'' at the very moment when he was embroiled in the Elysee Palace bugging scandal. He considered these revelations as personal attacks by his opponents.

programme.title: Movie - Naan Mirugamai Mara
programme.desc: The tragic killing of his brother makes Bhoominathan hungry for brutal revenge. He hires some contract killers, but soon realises that his family's safety is on the line.

programme.title: Movie - Thambi
programme.desc: Thambi, a young man with a tragic past, wishes to see the city free of crime and violence. In order to succeed in this mission, he tries to reform Shankara Pandian, a notorious gangster.

programme.title: Movie - Dhairiyam
programme.desc: Kumaran saves Jenny from the perpetrator Pawan. Following a duel, Pawan slips into a coma while his friends are found dead. The mystery behind the murders unravels in a story of twists and turns.

programme.title: Movie - Echil Iravugal
programme.desc: Echchil Iravugal is a 1982 Indian Tamil-language film directed by Prof. A. S. Pragasam, starring Roopa, Prathap Pothan, Raveendran and Vanitha.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Raja Kaiya Vecha
programme.desc: Raja pretends to be a cop in order to impress the woman he loves, and she dumps him on learning the truth. When they meet again, he has a good job, but there is someone else who is in love with him.

programme.title: Movie - Mambattiyaan
programme.desc: When Mambattiyan's father is killed by a landlord, Mambattiyan kills him and escapes to the forest. He and his group steal from the rich and serve the poor. DIG Ranjith plans to nab him come what may.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Koattai
programme.desc: Kamali loses her bag in the railway station. Later, her bag is sent to her home along with a letter from Surya, who found it. Kamali and Surya send letters to each other and soon fall in love.

programme.title: Movie - Ninaivirukkum Varai
programme.desc: Jani, a rowdy, falls in love with Sandhya but does not express his love for fear of losing her friendship. But he tries to break up her marriage when he learns a shocking truth about her groom.

programme.title: Movie - Thirumalai
programme.desc: Thirumalai, a mechanic, falls in love with Swetha, a young woman. Despite initial differences, she soon reciprocates his feeling but her father tries to break them up.

programme.title: Movie - Makkal Veeran
programme.desc: Ganga, a camerawoman, helps Rambabu, a fiery mechanic, to become a journalist. When an evil politician Ranababu kills reputed journalist Surya, Rambabu decides to destroy his political career.

The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 39
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United's star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it's not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he's faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 5
programme.desc: With nearly 500 Premier League games to his name, and tenth all time in goals scored, Jermain Defoe has left an indelible mark on the Premier League. PL Moments sits down with the former West Ham, Spurs, Portsmouth, Sunderland and Bournemouth striker to look back at the goals and the games that defined his career. Defoe reflects on his childhood, road to the Premier League, his international career as well as his work off the pitch.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal (MW36) (Live) - EP 359
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 19
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW36) - EP 352
programme.desc: Defeat for Wolves in this match would mean they’ve lost against all other 19 Premier League clubs this season. It would be just the second time a team has lost to every side they’ve faced in a campaign, after Sheffield United in 2023-24.

programme.title: Fulham vs Bournemouth (MW36) - EP 353
programme.desc: Following victories against Burnley and Aston Villa, Fulham are looking to win three consecutive home league games for the first time since December 2023.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Everton (MW36) - EP 357
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton (D9 L12), and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021 (D2 L6).

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal (MW36) - EP 359
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: Sunderland vs Manchester United (MW36) - EP 354
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle United (MW36) - EP 358
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last three Premier League games, beating Burnley 4-1, Sunderland 5-0 and Chelsea 3-1. They last scored 3+ goals in four consecutive top-flight games in March/April 1995.

programme.title: Burnley vs Aston Villa (MW36) - EP 356
programme.desc: Burnley have won one of their last 26 Premier League matches (D7 L18), coming from 2-0 down to beat Crystal Palace 3-2 in February.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Everton (MW36) - EP 357
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton (D9 L12), and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021 (D2 L6).

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal (MW36) - EP 359
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 19
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW36) - EP 352
programme.desc: Defeat for Wolves in this match would mean they’ve lost against all other 19 Premier League clubs this season. It would be just the second time a team has lost to every side they’ve faced in a campaign, after Sheffield United in 2023-24.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features part 2 of all the highlights from BodogFIGHT season two showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Berto vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undeafeated Andre Berto (25-0, 19 KOs) in his 4th defense of the WBC Welterweight Title as he takes on former WBO Champion Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (27-2, 21 KOs) at the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA on April 10, 2010.

programme.title: Return to the Ring
programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you 'Return to the Ring'. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxing's most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (I)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the first encounter between Sergio Martinez and Paul Williams. The bout is closely contested throughout and was pegged as a Fight of the Year candidate for 2009.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From Tokyo, Ryogoku Kokugikan, Show 5 features Terunofuji, Mitakeumi, Shodai and Asanoyama.

programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Houston Qualifier tackle the Houston Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Walking Bar, Crazy Cliffhanger and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: WCCB
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Abu Dhabi Grand Slam on world Judo day, we speak to double world champion Mayra Aguiar about the unity of the Brazilian judo team, and watch as two world champions battle for gold in the -57kg division.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Adonis Stevenson vs. Jesus Gonzales
programme.desc: This episode features a super middleweight brawl between top contenders Adonis Stevenson and Jesus Gonzales that includes a Knockout of the Year candidate, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 features Hakuho, Endo, Okinoumi and Yutakayamai from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium, in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at how John Alessio, a MMA veteran of almost 20 years, prepares for an upcoming fight. We head inside the kitchen of one of MMA's leading nutritionists, Mike Dolce, to find out what are the approved foods in the Dolce Diet. Melvin Guillard summons his inner daredevil and jumps off the Stratosphere in Las Vegas, plus much more.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 98
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bounce on The Tubby Bouncy. Po bounces as high as a cloud, then Laa-Laa bounces higher, Dipsy bounces even higher and Tinky Winky bounces highest of all.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing as they play Peekaboo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 4
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 5
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 6
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 31
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: Evil Pea is annoyed by Supertato's winning smile, so she takes all the toothpaste in the supermarket to make sure it disappears forever.

programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning the clubhouse so the squirrels take refuge in the treehouse, but it's getting a little bit cramped these days. Norrie has an idea - maybe they need to add an extension.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 26

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies bottom bounce on The Tubby Bouncy before wiggling their bottoms to a special bottom bump song.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `ship', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of different types of ships: a big ship, a sailing ship, a pirate ship, and a shaky, shaky ship.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap is too much.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 37
programme.desc: Xuli and Foz help NASA after a close encounter with a UFO makes them lose the Mars Rover.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head to Alaska, America on a baby animal mission to help rescue some black bear cubs high up in a tree. Along the way, Andy meets a grumpy Arctic ground squirrel.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 44
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help her find a new place for her friend Isabelle the Sun-bell Daisy. This proves trickier than initially planned as Isabelle has some specific needs.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 6

programme.title: Civilisations: Rise and Fall (S1) - EP 3

programme.title: Griff's Canadian Adventure (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones begins his exploration of Ontario at Niagara Falls, right on the U.S border, to uncover what it is that makes Canadians so nice.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Danube: Europe's Mightiest River (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: In Budapest Joanna explores the river by boat and rides a unique children's railway, as well as discovering the city's Jewish heritage.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the evolving understanding of whales, how much they have in common with humans, and how recent discoveries could help to better protect them from threats in an increasingly changing world.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Seth Meyers with guests Maya Rudolph and Michael Gandolfini. (US TX: 6 May 2025).

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Seth Meyers with guests Lisa Kudrow and Nicholas Braun. (US TX: 7 May 2025).

programme.title: Converge
programme.desc: Capital Group CEO Mike Gitlin examines how geopolitical shocks, shifting trade rules and market volatility are reshaping investment strategy. He shares where capital is moving now and how investors may need to reposition for a more uncertain world.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC’s longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Brendan Fraser and Kate Mara, musical performance by Trueno, and special appearance by Mick Jagger. (US TX: 06 May 2026).

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Keith Richards, Molly Gordon and Daniel Dae Kim, and musical performance by Kim Petras. (US TX: 07 May 2026).

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Police Lt. Joe Gliniewicz’s shooting death in the woods sparks a massive manhunt to find his killers. But "GI Joe," as local people call him, is no hero.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: The CEO of the London Stock Exchange reflects on why she didn’t want to follow in the footsteps of her renowned lawyer parents, her decision to come out as gay while a young banker in the City, and the bold steps she’s taking to modernize the LSE.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC travels to Evian-Les-Bains to visit the operational hub of Danone’s most famous water brand. We sit down exclusively with Danone’s CEO, Antoine de Saint-Affrique to learn more about the company’s ‘health through food’ strategy, and take you up the French Alps to explore Evian’s heritage, premium positioning and role within the group.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Morning Call - EP 1
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: Morning Call - EP 2
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box - EP 1
programme.desc: "Squawk Box" is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street - EP 1
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street - EP 2
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street - EP 3
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street - EP 4
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Razor

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say

In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 18 (R)
programme.desc: Hideyoshi rises to become a senior retainer of the Oda clan and is granted Kita-Omi. Building Nagahama Castle, he becomes a daimyo and, together with Koichiro, takes the surname Hashiba. Tasked with governing the castle town, Koichiro struggles with a severe shortage of manpower. On Hanbei’s advice, he decides to hold a selection process to recruit capable retainers.

Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings "Fukushima Sake: A Comeback to the Top" (R)
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the "Lost Era" following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.desc: Witness the parenting challenges of "Superman", the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

This family "reboot" drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 33
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Honour - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 2
programme.desc: Pan-ho tries to make Ho-young recall any clue that could point to him as the hit-and-run culprit. Sang-hyuk is determined to find the killer, but Gang-heon orders him to return to the States

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven: Resurrection - EP 11
programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 11
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2207
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 879
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Chi-ming offers to be reassigned to the cardiothoracic and pulmonary surgery department as he wants to listen to Yat-yin. Kai-ching finds out Kin-pong’s investments are losing money. And she objects to his plan to surrender to Wing-sing to borrow money to repay debts.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 27
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2207
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 20
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 879
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: What If - EP 20
programme.desc: Regular girl Xia Guo (Zhong Chu Xi) is faced with a dilemma. Would she choose to live a home-sweet-home life with her boyfriend in her hometown or seize the opportunity to forge a successful career in a big city?

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 1
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 11
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 13
programme.desc: Moon-yuet has to gather incriminating evidence against Kei-tsun at all costs. She tells Ka-long about the recording pen that Chit-yin carries with him. Police conduct a search, which includes outdoor areas, in the Cheung household. But they find nothing. Moon-yuet unrelentingly teams up with Shing Fung to investigate.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 880
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] AKL top management put pressure on Tak-kiu due to some scandalous story about him and Yi-ka, resulting in him being unable to vote for Yat-yin on the board. Hang-fong suggests a deal to Yat-yin. If Yat-yin allows the hospital to sell patient information, she could get Hang-fong’s vote in exchange.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 14
programme.desc: Ka-long goes through Chun-keung’s belongings. He somehow discovers a CCTV hard disk associated with Moon-yuet. Moon-yuet has doubts about Kei-tsun claiming he did not engage in spiking. And she reviews the clip and finds nothing. She then finds out Man-sing edited the clip. From the original footage, Moon-yuet finds out a woman in high heels spiked the coffee, and just one person in Hong Kong bought those limited edition high heels.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 17
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan releases some recording to prove Yat-yin has joined Zodiac only because of vengeance. Yat-yin is suspended, and Fong Yan readily becomes the Chair. Because of the recording, Lai-suet suspects Yat-yin was the culprit behind the plane crash. But Yi-ka has reservations.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 29

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 881
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 4
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 8
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 6
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 7
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 29
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 13
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 4
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Speakers Of Law - EP 21
programme.desc: Kam Bing-shun (Kenneth Ma) is a top law student. However, due to a miscarriage of justice, he decides to follow the path to becoming a Legal Executive. By means of his diplomatic and tactful approach, Bing-shun gradually builds his own brand, Adviser Kam. The law firm where Adviser Kam works abruptly faces the prospect of closing down. He uses networking to defuse the situation. He is also invited by lawyers Tin Yau-ka (Lam Ha Mei) and Yu Kwok-tung (Stephen Wong) to join their team.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 27
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 2
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 3
